name: personal-skills
description: Generic, repo-agnostic skills: a lean frontend design-and-ship library. Three entry-point commands — /the-one-move (commit a non-generic STRUCTURE before building a new frontend, then hand off to impeccable), /improve-platform (audit + phased improvement of AI-generated platforms), and /ui-check (quick single-screen UI review with proposed changes). The build engine is impeccable (design fluency, 22 sub-commands; github.com/pbakaus/impeccable, Apache-2.0). Aesthetic direction comes from the taste suite (github.com/leonxlnx/taste-skill, MIT): design-taste-frontend plus the minimalist-ui, industrial-brutalist-ui, and high-end-visual-design style presets and redesign-existing-projects — each defers to impeccable's anti-slop bans on conflict. ui-ux-pro-max (github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill, MIT) is the searchable design-intelligence database. A small set of audit primitives from designer-skills (github.com/Owl-Listener/designer-skills, MIT) backs the commands: accessibility-audit, heuristic-evaluation, information-architecture, design-debt-audit, and the four critique-* single-screen reviews. Also includes corpus-flow (an LLM-maintained project wiki + todos→briefs→done work lifecycle), bootstrap-vps-deploy (a zero-dependency static-client + pm2-service deploy behind Caddy), grill-me (interview-style plan/design stress-testing), plan-split-dispatch (a repo-agnostic, model-routed subagent implementation orchestrator: opus plans, splits, and verifies; Sonnet executes chunks by default incl. medium-hard ones; opus takes only the novel/risky chunks), and orchestrate (a repo-agnostic work-intake router — /orchestrate — that runs on top of corpus-flow: it ensures a corpus/ workspace exists, reads corpus/routing.md, classifies intent, and routes capture→corpus-flow, build→plan-split-dispatch, query→wiki). Together corpus-flow + plan-split-dispatch + orchestrate form a generic quality/token-efficiency/UX workflow: grilled immutable briefs and a curated wiki for quality, model-routed dispatch (executor=Sonnet by default incl. medium-hard, opus for novel/risky + the plan/verify seat) + scoped context for token efficiency, one front door for UX. Plus a research/understanding trio: web-research (sourced, fact-checked reports — inline web search for token efficiency, subagents only for code exploration with a gate before fanning out beyond 5, model-routed opus/sonnet, twin Markdown-report + concise HTML-digest deliverables), performance-analysis (measure a live page with Chrome DevTools MCP — Core Web Vitals, traces, Lighthouse, network — and rank fixes by measured impact), and codegraph (graph-first/grep-verify code understanding; pairs with corpus-flow's per-repo code-graph layer). See ATTRIBUTION.md.
license: SEE ATTRIBUTION.md (vendored skills retain their original MIT / Apache-2.0 licenses)
